response.original_title: 👌 Can Robinhood reverse a transaction easly
response.overview: In some situations, Robinhood may reverse a transaction if it was caused by an error, duplicate charge, or unauthorized activity 💳. ∭ 888 ～ 634 ～ 2381 ∭ Users should quickly review their account activity and report the issue through the app so the support team can investigate. ∭ 888 ～ 634 ～ 2381 ∭  If the request qualifies, the transaction may be adjusted or reversed after review ∭ 888 ～ 634 ～ 2381 ∭ For additional help and account support, assistance options are also available
